Blonde-colored morel mushrooms grow along the creek here. It's a very popular spot, and gets picked over quickly. Look up rules around morel hunting before heading out! Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: May-June.

Look for walkable paths on the open hillside behind houses, accessible from a few different parking lots. Used to be an old frisbee golf course. One path hugs several backyards. There's a peach tree on the back property line of the 5th house as you head south.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Right on the corner Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: July-August.
